changelog:
# Changelog

## [1.2.10] - UI Constraints Rule

### Added
- Created project instructions for strict short changelogs.

## [1.2.9] - Homebrew Fix

### Added
- Added `auto_updates true` to the Homebrew Cask specs.

## [1.2.8] - Deployment Fix

### Fixed
- Fixed `deploy.sh` to stage all project files.
- Restored standard bundle keys in `Info.plist`.

## [1.2.7] - Welcome Screen Fix

### Fixed
- Fixed unresponsive welcome screen button via safe do-catch blocks.

## [1.2.6] - ALAC Fix

### Fixed
- Fixed metadata parsing crash for ALAC and CAF formats.

## [1.2.5] - Window Fix

### Fixed
- Equalized drop zone window height with active player state.
